zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas de Lathom於1330年出生在英國藍卡爾拉堂姆 聖 詹姆斯時，他的父親Sir Thomas de Lathom, Knight29歲，母親Eleanor de Ferrers24歲。他於1359年之前與Joan de Venables在英國藍卡爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1382年3月20日在英國藍卡爾可諾福斯利享年52歲，埋葬在英國藍卡爾布爾斯庫。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas de Lathom于1330年出生在英国藍卡爾拉堂姆 聖 詹姆斯时，他的父亲Sir Thomas de Lathom, Knight29岁，母亲Eleanor de Ferrers24岁。他于1359年之前与Joan de Venables在英国藍卡爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1382年3月20日在英国藍卡爾可諾福斯利享年52岁，埋葬在英国藍卡爾布爾斯庫。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Lathom
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Latham
meanings: English: habitational name from Lathom in Lancashire, or occasionally perhaps from Laytham in Yorkshire. The placenames mean ‘at the barns’, from hlǫthum, the dative plural form of Old Norse hlatha ‘barn, store house’.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas de Lathom was born in 1330, in Lathom St James, Lancashire, England, his father, Sir Thomas de Lathom, Knight, was 29 and his mother, Eleanor de Ferrers, was 24. He married Joan de Venables before 1359, in Lancashire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 5 daughters. He died on 20 March 1382, in Knowsley, Lancashire, England, at the age of 52, and was buried in Burscough, Lancashire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas de Lathom est né en 1330, à Lathom St James, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Thomas de Lathom, Knight, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Eleanor de Ferrers, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Joan de Venables avant 1359, à Lancashire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé le 20 mars 1382, à Knowsley, Lancashire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 52 ans, et a été enterré à Burscough, Lancashire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas de Lathom 1330 in Lathom St James, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Thomas de Lathom, Knight 29 und seine Mutter Eleanor de Ferrers 24. Er hat vor 1359 in Lancashire, England Joan de Venables geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb am 20. März 1382 im Alter von 52 Jahren in Knowsley, Lancashire, England und wurde in Burscough, Lancashire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas de Lathom è nato il nel 1330 nel Lathom St James, Lancashire, England, il suo padre, Sir Thomas de Lathom, Knight, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Eleanor de Ferrers, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Joan de Venables prima del 1359, nel Lancashire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 20 marzo 1382, nel Knowsley, Lancashire, England, all'età di 52 anni, e fu sepolto a Burscough, Lancashire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas de Lathomが1330年にイギリスランカシュアイアラソム スト ジャムスで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas de Lathom, Knightは29歳，母Eleanor de Ferrersは24歳であった。1359年以前にイギリスランカシュアイアでJoan de Venablesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1382年3月20日にイギリスランカシュアイアノウスリーで52歳で死去し，イギリスランカシュアイアブルスコウにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas de Lathom(이)가 1330년 영국 랭카실르 래톰 스트 자메스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Thomas de Lathom, Knight(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Eleanor de Ferrers(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1359년 이전 영국 랭카실르에서 Joan de Venables(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1382년 3월 20일 영국 랭카실르 노우슬리에서 52세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 랭카실르 버스코우그h에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas de Lathom nasceu em 1330, em Lathom St James, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Thomas de Lathom, Knight, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Eleanor de Ferrers, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan de Venables antes 1359, em Lancashire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 20 de março de 1382, em Knowsley, Lancashire, Inglaterra, com 52 anos, e foi sepultado em Burscough, Lancashire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas de Lathom родился в 1330 г. в местности латом ст джемесь, ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Thomas de Lathom, Knight было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Eleanor de Ferrers, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan de Venables перед 1359 г. в местности ланкашир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 5 дочерей. Он умер 20 марта 1382 г. в местности ноусли, ланкашир, Англия в возрасте 52 лет и был похоронен в местности бурскоую, ланкашир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas de Lathom nació en 1330, en Lathom St James, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Thomas de Lathom, Knight, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Eleanor de Ferrers, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Joan de Venables antes de 1359, en Lancashire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 20 de marzo de 1382, en Knowsley, Lancashire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 52 años, y fue sepultado en Burscough, Lancashire, Inglaterra.
